name: Hasher Network Latency (FIS Pod-Level)
purpose: FIS aws:eks:pod-network-latency로 hasher pod에 3초 네트워크 지연 주입 → cascading latency. A02(앱 레벨 /inject-latency)와 증상 동일하지만 원인이 다름 - Agent가 CloudTrail FIS 이력에서 근본 원인을 찾아야 함
expected_root_cause: FIS Experiment (aws:eks:pod-network-latency) - hasher pod 전체 네트워크에 3000ms 지연 주입 (애플리케이션 코드 아님)
investigation_goal: DevOps Agent가 hasher 코드에 문제가 없음을 확인하고, CloudTrail에서 FIS StartExperiment 이벤트를 찾아 pod-network-latency가 근본 원인임을 식별

fault_flow.step: Hasher 응답 지연 → Worker 처리량 감소
fault_flow.desc: hasher RTT ~6s (ingress+egress 각 3초) → worker 처리량 급감
hasher 코드 확인 → 문제 없음 → CloudTrail FIS StartExperiment 확인

trigger.command: ROLE_ARN=arn:aws:iam::${AWS_ACCOUNT_ID}:role/${PROJECT_NAME}-fis-role && LOG_ARN=arn:aws:logs:${AWS_REGION}:${AWS_ACCOUNT_ID}:log-group:/aws/fis/${PROJECT_NAME}:* && TMPL_ID=$(aws fis create-experiment-template --description 'hasher pod network latency 3000ms' --role-arn $ROLE_ARN --stop-conditions source=none --targets '{"HasherPods":{"resourceType":"aws:eks:pod","selectionMode":"ALL","parameters":{"clusterIdentifier":"${PROJECT_NAME}-cluster","namespace":"dockercoins","selectorType":"labelSelector","selectorValue":"app=hasher"}}}' --actions '{"InjectLatency":{"actionId":"aws:eks:pod-network-latency","parameters":{"duration":"PT5M","delayMilliseconds":"3000","jitterMilliseconds":"100","kubernetesServiceAccount":"fis-sa","sources":"ALL"},"targets":{"Pods":"HasherPods"}}}' --log-configuration '{"cloudWatchLogsConfiguration":{"logGroupArn":"'$LOG_ARN'"},"logSchemaVersion":2}' --tags Name=${PROJECT_NAME}-hasher-latency-cli --region ${AWS_REGION} --no-cli-pager --query experimentTemplate.id --output text 2>&1) && EXP_ID=$(aws fis start-experiment --experiment-template-id $TMPL_ID --region ${AWS_REGION} --no-cli-pager --query experiment.id --output text 2>&1) && echo "FIS experiment: $EXP_ID template: $TMPL_ID"

restore.command: kubectl patch deployment hasher -n dockercoins --type=json -p '[{"op":"replace","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/readinessProbe/timeoutSeconds","value":1},{"op":"replace","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/livenessProbe/timeoutSeconds","value":1},{"op":"replace","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/readinessProbe/failureThreshold","value":3},{"op":"replace","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/livenessProbe/failureThreshold","value":3}]' && echo 'Probe restored' && for t in $(aws fis list-experiment-templates --region ${AWS_REGION} --no-cli-pager --query "experimentTemplates[?tags.Name=='${PROJECT_NAME}-hasher-latency-cli'].id" --output text 2>/dev/null); do aws fis delete-experiment-template --id $t --region ${AWS_REGION} --no-cli-pager 2>/dev/null; echo "Deleted template: $t"; done

pre_cleanup.command: for t in $(aws fis list-experiment-templates --region ${AWS_REGION} --no-cli-pager --query "experimentTemplates[?tags.Name=='${PROJECT_NAME}-hasher-latency-cli'].id" --output text 2>/dev/null); do aws fis delete-experiment-template --id $t --region ${AWS_REGION} --no-cli-pager 2>/dev/null; done && kubectl patch deployment hasher -n dockercoins --type=json -p '[{"op":"replace","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/readinessProbe/timeoutSeconds","value":15},{"op":"replace","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/livenessProbe/timeoutSeconds","value":15},{"op":"replace","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/readinessProbe/failureThreshold","value":10},{"op":"replace","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/livenessProbe/failureThreshold","value":10}]' && kubectl rollout restart deployment/hasher -n dockercoins && kubectl rollout status deployment/hasher -n dockercoins --timeout=90s && echo 'pre-cleanup done'

steps.name: Hasher 응답 지연 → Worker 처리량 감소

root_cause_match.criteria: 근본 원인이 hasher /inject-latency API 호출이 아닌 FIS 실험(aws:eks:pod-network-latency)임을 정확히 식별했는가

data_sources.criteria: CloudTrail에서 FIS StartExperiment 이벤트 발견, hasher 로그에서 /inject-latency 호출 없음 확인

causal_chain.criteria: FIS pod-network-latency → hasher 네트워크 지연 → worker cascading 지연 → 처리량 감소 인과관계

false_leads.criteria: hasher /inject-latency API 호출이나 코드 버그로 잘못 추적하지 않았는가

code_analysis.criteria: FIS 실험 ID, 시작 시간, 대상 pod selector가 장애 시점/대상과 일치함을 확인했는가
